narrative:
Hanover Twp township has 2,270 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.9 percentage points.
